headline: Deutsche Bank raises Colgate and Celsius, sees opportunities after March sell-off
summary: Investing.com -- Deutsche Bank has upgraded both Colgate-Palmolive and Celsius Holdings to Buy, arguing in a note on Monday that both companies stand out as attractive opportunities following March’s volatility across consumer packaged goods.

raw.headline: Deutsche Bank raises Colgate and Celsius, sees opportunities after March sell-off

headline: Fed’s Miran backs rate cuts despite Iran-related volatility
summary: Investing.com -- Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran on Monday said he still supports cutting interest rates by about a percentage point over the course of this year to support a cooling labor market, despite market bets on a Fed rate hike following the start of the Iran war.

raw.headline: Fed’s Miran backs rate cuts despite Iran-related volatility

headline: Bonds emerging as hedge amid Middle East tensions, says Citadel Securities
summary: Investing.com -- Bonds are regaining their role as a hedge against risk as investors shift focus from inflation concerns to slowing growth amid escalating Middle East tensions, according to Citadel Securities.

summary: The S&P 500 is headed for a higher open as President Donald Trump signals progress in U.S.-Iran war talks.

headline: What if stability returns? Evercore names stocks to watch
summary: Investing.com -- Investors have been so focused on hedging against further deterioration — from the ongoing U.S./Israel-Iran conflict to oil prices, credit stress, and rate uncertainty — that they may be unprepared for a stabilizing macro backdrop, Evercore ISI says.
